noData.title: Nothing here yet
noData.body: Data will appear as soon as the first action happens.

firstTime.title: Welcome
firstTime.body: We'll show a quick intro, then your data.

error.title: Something broke
error.body: We're on it. Try again in a couple of seconds.

notFound.title: Nothing here
notFound.body: The link is outdated or the object was removed.

throttled.title: Too frequent
throttled.body: The source rate-limited us. We'll retry automatically.
